All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApplicationException
ApplicationException is propogated from Service classes when an business logic exception occurered.
BaseBean
Parent class of all Beans in application.
BaseCtl<B extends BaseBean,M extends BaseModel>
Base controller class of project.
BaseListCtl<B extends BaseBean,M extends BaseModel>
Base list controller class is extended by all the list pages in the application.
BaseModel<T extends BaseBean>
It contains generalized methods for a Model class.
BaseReportCtl<B extends BaseBean>
Abstract base servlet for JasperReports-based list reports.
BaseRestController<B extends BaseBean,M extends BaseModel>
URLs HTTP GET rest/userctl/get/1 HTTP GET rest/userctl/delete/1 HTTP POST rest/userctl/save HTTP POST rest/userctl/add HTTP POST rest/userctl/update HTTP POST rest/userctl/search
ChangePasswordCtl
Change Password functionality Controller.
CollegeBean
College JavaBean encapsulates College attributes
CollegeCtl
College functionality Controller.
CollegeListCtl
College List functionality Controller.
CollegeModel
JDBC Implementation of CollegeModel
CollegeReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a College list report in PDF or DOC format.
CourseBean
Course JavaBean encapsulates Course attributes
CourseCtl
 
CourseListCtl
 
CourseModel
JDBC Implementation of Course Model
CourseReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a Course list report in PDF or DOC format.
DatabaseException
DatabaseException is propogated by DAO classes when an unhandled Database exception occurred
DatabaseUtility
 
DataUtility
Data Utility class to format data from one format to another
DataValidator
This class validates input data
DropdownListBean
DropdownList interface is implemented by Beans those are used to create drop down list on HTML pages
DuplicateRecordException
DuplicateRecordException thrown when a duplicate record occurred
EmailBuilder
Class that build Application Email messages
EmailMessage
Contains Email Message
EmailUtility
Email Utility provides Email Services
EmailUtilityTest
Testcase to test EmailUtility class
EmployeeBean
 
EmployeeCtl
 
EmployeeListCtl
 
EmployeeModel
 
EmployeeTest
 
FacultyBean
 
FacultyCtl
 
FacultyListCtl
 
FacultyModel
 
FacultyReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a Faculty list report in PDF or DOC format.
ForgetPasswordCtl
Forget Password functionality Controller.
FormMessageTag
Tag displays Success or Error message of a submitted form <ors:formMsg />
FormSelect
Tag creates the HTML SELECT elements <ors:formSelect name="roleId" value="1" list="roleList" />
FrontController
Main Controller performs session checking and logging operations before calling any application controller.
GetMarksheetCtl
Get marksheet by given roll number
HelloServlet
 
HTMLUtility
HTML Utility class to produce HTML contents like Dropdown List.
InsuranceBean
 
InsuranceCtl
 
InsuranceListCtl
 
InsuranceModel
 
InsuranceReportCtl
 
InterviewBean
 
InterviewCtl
 
InterviewListCtl
 
InterviewModel
 
InterviewTest
 
JDBCDataSource
JDBC DataSource is a Data Connection Pool
LanguageFilter
Main Controller performs session checking and logging operations before calling any application controller.
LoginCtl
Login functionality Controller.
MarksheetBean
Marksheet JavaBean encapsulates Marksheet attributes
MarksheetCtl
Marksheet functionality Controller.
MarksheetListCtl
Servlet implementation class MarksheetlistCtl
MarksheetMeritListCtl
Marksheet Merit List functionality Controller.
MarksheetModel
JDBC Implementation of Marksheet Model
MarksheetReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a Marksheet list report in PDF or DOC format.
MessageSource
 
MessageTag
Display i18n message <ors:message key="key" />
MyProfileCtl
My Profile functionality Controller.
ORSResponse
Contains REST response
ORSView
Contains ORS View and Controller URI
PerformanceMonitorFilter
Main Controller performs session checking and logging operations before calling any application controller.
ProductBean
 
ProductCtl
 
ProductListCtl
 
ProductModel
 
PropertyReader
Read the property values from application properties file using Resource Bundle
RecordNotFoundException
RecordNotFoundException thrown when a record not found occurred
RoleBean
Role JavaBean encapsulates Role attributes
RoleCtl
Role functionality Controller.
RoleListCtl
Role List functionality Controller.
RoleModel
JDBC Implementation of Role Model
RoleModelTest
Role Model Test classes
RoleReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a Role list report in PDF or DOC format.
RoleRestCtl
 
ServletUtility
This is a utility class that provides basic servlet operations like forward, redirect, generic exception handling, access success and error messages, set and get default Bean and List objects, manage pagination parameters
StudentBean
Student JavaBean encapsulates Student attributes
StudentCtl
Student functionality Controller.
StudentListCtl
Student List functionality Controller.
StudentModel
JDBC Implementation of Student Model
StudentReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a Student list report in PDF or DOC format.

SubjectModel
 
SubjectReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a Subject list report in PDF or DOC format.
Test
 
TestInsurance
 
TestProduct

User JavaBean encapsulates User attributes

* User functionality Controller.
UserListCtl
User List functionality Controller.
UserModel
JDBC Implementation of UserModel
UserModelTest
User Model Test classes
UserRegistrationCtl
User registration functionality Controller.
UserReportCtl
Report servlet that generates a User list report in PDF or DOC format.
UserRestCtl
 
WelcomeCtl
